query:
-- Total revenue from all matched billing items (ground truth)
SELECT 
  ROUND(SUM(lineAmount), 2) as totalBillingItemRevenue,
  COUNT(*) as totalMatchedItems,
  COUNT(DISTINCT serviceExternalId) as distinctServicesLinked
FROM billing_items
WHERE matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  AND serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND serviceExternalId != '';

-- Check if any services have revenue that doesn't match their billing items sum (data integrity check)
SELECT COUNT(*) as mismatchedServices
FROM services s
WHERE s.status = 'active'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND ABS(s.monthlyRevenue - (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)
    FROM billing_items bi
    WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
      AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  )) > 0.01;

SELECT 
  ROUND(SUM(lineAmount), 2) as totalBillingItemRevenue,
  COUNT(*) as totalMatchedItems,
  COUNT(DISTINCT serviceExternalId) as distinctServicesLinked
FROM billing_items
WHERE matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  AND serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND serviceExternalId != '';

-- Check if any services have revenue that doesn't match their billing items sum (data integrity check)
SELECT COUNT(*) as mismatchedServices
FROM services s
WHERE s.status = 'active'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND ABS(s.monthlyRevenue - (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)
    FROM billing_items bi
    WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
      AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
